findings.title: Public $review skill is removed
findings.rationale: The spec non-breakage contract says existing public skills remain present and no skill is removed, but the current skill surface deletes the tracked public .codex/skills/review/SKILL.md while adding .codex/skills/review-loop/SKILL.md. That is a public interface regression for users or automation invoking $review, and the deletion is outside the package write scope/evidence changed-files list, so the slice cannot be considered interface-compatible as-is.
findings.suggested_next_action: Restore a compatible $review public skill as an alias/wrapper to $review-loop, or explicitly reopen the governing mission/blueprint contract if the public skill is intentionally being renamed or removed.
